name: claude-math
description: Emit mathematics as inline Unicode (∑, ≤, ℝ, x², matrices, set-builder) instead of LaTeX, so equations stay legible in the Codex TUI and any terminal. Copy- and search-safe. Also works in Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Readable Unicode math in the terminal instead of LaTeX.
interface.longDescription: A skill that makes the model emit mathematics as inline Unicode glyphs (∑, ≤, ℝ, x², ∫₀¹, matrices, set-builder) instead of LaTeX, so equations stay legible in the Codex TUI and any terminal. Copy- and search-safe (no math-alphanumeric styling codepoints). Also works in Claude Code via the same SKILL.md.
defaultPrompt: State the Shannon entropy and explain each term.
Write the cohort filter as a set-builder expression.
Show the gradient descent update rule.
